title: Big Tech Is Buying Up Open Source... Vite Is Next
summary: Cloudflare acquired VoidZero, the company behind developer tools Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, and Oxc. The video discusses this as part of a broader trend of big tech companies acquiring open source developer tooling, and explores concerns about consolidation alongside potential benefits.
